reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención en todas las áreas, muy limpio todo.
Lástima que no tengan un lugar techado par ubicar las motos debajo y protejerlas de las inclemencias del clima.
Quizá piensen que no vale la pena porque es un bien de relativo bajo costo comparado con un auto, pero no es así ya que hay motos que tienen el mismo valor o son mucho más caras que cualquier auto de alta gama.
Creo que merecen ser protegidas a la vez que se respetaria al socio y/o visitante.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service in all areas, everything was very clean.
It's a shame they don't have a covered area to park the motorcycles and protect them from the weather.
Perhaps they think it's not worth it because motorcycles are relatively inexpensive compared to cars, but that's not the case, as there are motorcycles that are worth the same as, or even much more than, any high-end car.
I believe they deserve to be protected, and that would also show respect to members and visitors.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQMF8yUzhBRRAB
